1876070.name: Windsor - Grand Strategy MMO
1876070.description:
‼️ Pre-Alpha Game ‼️


Windsor is a persistent massively multiplayer grand strategy game currently in the very early stages of development.

It's like: Age of Empires 👑 and Civilization 🌎 had a baby and put every player on the same map.

👑 Rule over an empire of other players. Recruit bannermen, receive tributes, and work together to conquer castles.
⏩ Plan your moves by fast-forwarding in time
⏱ Play on your own time. Wars take place over days and weeks.
⚔️ Raise an army of different soldier types, each with different strengths and weaknesses.
📱 Check in when you're AFK - Windsor is available on your phone. Search for "Windsor Strategy" on your app store of choice

...and most-importantly, join the community helping to define what Windsor will become. Follow the link to the discord from inside the game.
1876070.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
